content.rendered:
How It Started

Starr Cleaning is a well-known, family-run service business offering carpet, tile, and upholstery cleaning. Their reputation offline was strong, but online, their website wasn’t pulling its weight.

They wanted to streamline how leads came in, highlight their seasonal offers, and reduce the constant back-and-forth of quoting over the phone. That’s when they reached out to us.

We started with a custom homepage mockup, aligned on their goals, and quickly moved into building a complete lead generation system.

Project Overview

This project wasn’t just about a prettier website, it was about building a system.

Here’s what we focused on:

  • Make their service offers pop visually
  • Capture leads directly through an optimized SmartForm
  • Showcase the team and real results to build trust
  • Position them for long-term growth with local SEO structure

Their new site needed to look sharp, feel fast, and match the professionalism they bring into every client’s home.

What We Did

1. Bold Website Redesign

  • Created a custom layout that makes booking and quoting easy
  • Featured their “$100 OFF” promo prominently on the homepage
  • Highlighted service types (tile, upholstery, carpet) with clear CTAs and visuals

2. Lead-Ready SmartForm

  • Built a branded SmartForm with conditional logic for service selection
  • Installed phone number capture + quote request routing to speed up responses
  • Designed it to work across desktop and mobile with instant alerts

3. Local Search Optimization

  • Wrote all service pages with lead-focused copy and local SEO in mind
  • Added schema markup, review widgets, and Google-friendly formatting
  • Structured pages to rank for both residential and commercial cleaning searches

Real Improvements

  • Better lead flow with a SmartForm and on-page quote requests
  • Stronger brand visuals tied to their existing vans and uniforms
  • Easy-to-update backend for seasonal offers and future service pages
  • A site built to convert—faster, cleaner, and ready for ads or SEO campaigns

Final CTA

If your current website feels outdated or you’re relying too much on phone calls and DMs, you’re leaving conversions on the table.

We help local service pros like Starr turn their website into a real sales asset.

Want a preview of how we’d do it for you?

excerpt.rendered: We redesigned Starr Cleaning’s website to streamline quote requests, promote seasonal offers, and boost conversions. The result? A cleaner, bolder, lead-ready platform they can grow with.
